# Scenario: empty-shell-tty
# Invocation: `bakudo` (TTY attached, no saved session for this repo)
# Renderer: transcriptRenderer (ANSI on)
# frame.mode = "prompt"
#
# Legend for inline ANSI (minimal, bold + color only):
#   \e[1m ... \e[0m       -> bold
#   \e[2m ... \e[0m       -> dim
#   \e[36m ... \e[0m      -> cyan (Bakudo brand)
#   \e[33m ... \e[0m      -> yellow (hint footer)
# Escapes are shown as literal \e sequences for reviewer diffing.
# PTY golden comparator strips the leading "# " comment block before compare.

\e[36m\e[1mBakudo\e[0m  \e[1mstandard\e[0m  \e[2mno active session\e[0m  \e[2mrepo bakudo-abox\e[0m

\e[36mBakudo:\e[0m Ready. Ask for a plan or build change, or use \e[1m/resume\e[0m to reopen a prior session.

\e[33m[new] [resume] [help]\e[0m
>
